channel.title: Chrome-Extensions on Joe Muller's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Chrome-Extensions on Joe Muller's Blog

item.title: Create a Chrome Extension With React, Typescript, and Tailwindcss
item.description: Contents This article was inspired by Creating a Chrome Extension with React a Step by Step Guide. Creating a Popup 1. Create React App Use the official Create React App CLI to kickstart your project: npx create-react-app react-chrome-ext --template typescript cd react-chrome-ext 2. Update the Files Update App.tsx to show a simple string: function App() { return ( <div className="App"> Hello World </div> ); } export default App; Update index.tsx:
